clean_text:
I am writing to express my extreme dissatisfaction with the poor service and unprofessional behavior I experienced at your Cyberjaya branch on 1 December 2024. What should have been a simple drive-thru transaction turned into a frustrating and deeply disappointing ordeal due to an unreasonable delay and the unacceptable attitude of your staff.

I ordered a Sausage Cheese Omelette Muffin with Hash Brown. I was informed that the hash browns were unavailable and would be replaced with fries, which I agreed to. However, when it was my turn to collect the food, I was told the order was not ready and asked to wait further ahead.

I waited 25 minutes while other cars received their orders and left. Frustrated by the prolonged delay, I approached the staff to inquire about my order. The worker I spoke to displayed rude and dismissive body language, making no effort to address my concerns or offer an explanation for the delay. She simply took my bill without a word, prepared the food, and handed it to me without so much as an apology for the inconvenience caused.

When I returned to my car and checked the food, I discovered that the Sausage Cheese Omelette Muffin was missing the sausage—a critical part of the meal I paid for. This added insult to injury, as I had already endured poor service and disrespectful behavior.

I find this level of service completely unacceptable for a brand like McDonald’s, which prides itself on customer satisfaction. The staff’s rude behavior, lack of communication, extended wait time, and the incorrect order have left me questioning the professionalism and standards of this branch.

This experience highlighted the unacceptable and unprofessional customer service standards at your Cyberjaya branch.

To the Management of Burger King,

I’m writing to express my deep dissatisfaction with the customer service I received from the managers at Burger King Bukit Puchong.

I sincerely hope Burger King will take immediate action against the male and female managers at this outlet. Their behavior reflects poorly on the brand and goes against the standard of customer service I expect from a global company like Burger King.

Thank you.

Sincerely,
[A Regular Customer of Burger King Bukit Puchong]

clean_text:
One star for this place and only because the environment is clean, other than that, they don’t deserve any stars.

I came here for lunch and waited at the counter as usual, but the counter girl looked at me and pointed at the kiosk machine, “you’ll have to order there”.
Mind you, there was already one person waiting behind me before the girl noticed that we stood by the counter waiting for her to serve. I don’t even want to mention that one machine was down with some system maintenance and I had to wait for the guy behind me to finish his order first.

No one wanted to help me with the other kiosk, another worker over there said “You just wait for a bit, it’s updating”
The update never finished and I waited for another kiosk.
I made my order and I went to the counter and ask them to change the chicken parts, before they prepared the order. This one mak cik heard and then walked away saying loudly in Malay “So tiring! All these people making requests here and there!”
I asked BEFORE you even prepared the order. Is there a problem?

Got my order and chicken was so underwhelming. They were bland, absolutely the most tasteless chicken I’ve ever tasted in a KFC branch.

My husband wanted ketchup but the dispenser was broken. When asked, the counter girl again said “if there’s no ketchup there’s no ketchup”
But kudos to this one foreign worker that came upstairs just to help check that the dispenser was blocked.

Even foreign worker has a better attitude than local workers! Please get the staff some reality check!

clean_text:
Imagine working extra hard for minimum wage, only to make someone else’s job harder with stupid rules. What kind of nonsense says we can’t proceed with a delivery just because we don’t bring a tote bag? There’s no mandatory rule in any rider company that requires collecting food with a tote bag — for delivery, yes, you need a delivery box, but that’s completely different. Go study the actual rules before making up ridiculous ones.

If you’re worried someone might steal your food, don’t be stupid — riders have an app to verify orders, check IDs, and everything else. And if you’re worried about riders mixing Halal and non-Halal food, can’t you see who’s collecting it? Whether the rider is Muslim or not, that’s already clear. Even if not, it’s your responsibility to give proper packaging. We riders know what to do.

And even if you still insist on enforcing your rule, at least speak properly and with some manners instead of acting arrogantly like you own the place. At least explain why we need to follow that rule and whether there’s any alternative, instead of refusing to answer or give an explanation. What nonsense.

address: 1, Jalan SS 15/3a, Ss 15, 47500 Subang Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia
clean_text:
- Poor communication and arrangement
After submitting the booking, nobody contacted us within 48 hours as promised. We had to call many times before someone answered, and even then no follow-up was done until we called again ourselves.

- No proper guidance
There were no clear instructions for the birthday booking process. Last minute only informed us to place food order together with deposit payment. We sent our order through WhatsApp but got no response until 2 hours before the party.

- Missing promised freebies
Website mentioned “Fun Freebies” for party booking, but we did not receive invitation cards, birthday child exclusive meal, and there were not enough party hats and party games.

- Wrong information about mascot
We confirmed twice with McDonald’s Subang Jaya DT branch that the mascot would be available. On the actual day, they suddenly said there was no mascot. Only after we questioned them again did they arrange it.

- Unclear and misleading food pricing
We booked the 1.5-hour birthday package, which required a minimum spending of RM200 on food and beverages. We initially selected a package worth RM175 and added 2 more meal sets plus drinks to meet the minimum spending requirement. However, during payment, we noticed the bill was overcharged. When we questioned it, the staff explained that they charged à la carte prices for each item instead of the package pricing. This was never clearly mentioned to us beforehand.

- Overall disappointing experience
Poor management, weak communication, and misleading information made the birthday celebration stressful and disappointing.

address: 2, Jalan 2/50C, Off, Jalan Genting Kelang, Taman Setapak Indah Jaya, 53300, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
clean_text:
I placed an order at KFC on 30/8/2025 at 5:53 PM and chose dine-in. After waiting for almost 20 minutes, I noticed something was wrong because my food still hadn’t arrived. I went to ask the female manager in a grey uniform about my order, and to my shock, she said the system did not receive my order. And then? She took no action, showed no intention to help, and just left me waiting there.

About 10 minutes later, I asked the front counter staff again. He told me my order was not in the system, no receipt was issued, and therefore it couldn’t be prepared. But I had already ordered, and the payment had been deducted. I even showed him all the evidence, but he insisted there was nothing he could do. By then, almost 30 minutes had passed.

Only after further discussion with another staff member did they finally agree to prepare my order, after taking a photo of my payment receipt as proof. From the time I ordered until I finally received my food, it took about 50 minutes. I had to wait in front of the cashier the whole time, chasing them at least 4 times, yet no one took responsibility or cared.

This was extremely frustrating and disappointing. To anyone planning to visit this outlet, please be aware—the service attitude here is terribly bad.

Saya membuat pesanan di KFC pada 30/8/2025 jam 5.53 petang dan memilih dine-in. Selepas menunggu hampir 20 minit, saya rasa ada yang tidak kena kerana makanan saya masih belum sampai. Saya bertanya kepada pengurus perempuan berbaju kelabu tentang pesanan saya, dan yang mengejutkan, dia berkata sistem tidak menerima pesanan saya. Dan kemudian? Tiada sebarang tindakan, langsung tiada niat untuk membantu, hanya biarkan saya menunggu di situ.

Selepas kira-kira 10 minit, saya bertanya lagi kepada kakitangan kaunter depan. Dia memberitahu bahawa pesanan saya tidak masuk dalam sistem, tiada resit dikeluarkan, jadi tidak boleh disediakan. Tetapi saya sudah pun membuat pesanan, dan bayaran telah ditolak. Saya tunjukkan semua bukti, namun dia tetap berkeras mengatakan tiada apa yang boleh dibuat. Ketika itu, hampir 30 minit telah berlalu.

Hanya selepas berbincang dengan seorang lagi kakitangan, barulah mereka bersetuju untuk menyediakan pesanan saya, setelah mengambil gambar resit pembayaran saya sebagai bukti. Dari masa saya membuat pesanan sehingga akhirnya menerima makanan, ia mengambil masa kira-kira 50 minit. Saya terpaksa menunggu di depan kaunter sepanjang masa, mengejar mereka sekurang-kurangnya 4 kali, namun tiada siapa yang bertanggungjawab atau peduli.

Pengalaman ini amat mengecewakan dan menghampakan. Kepada sesiapa yang ingin mengunjungi cawangan ini, sila berhati-hati—sikap perkhidmatan di sini sangat teruk.

Assalamualaikum / Salam Sejahtera,

Saya ingin membuat aduan berkaitan kualiti makanan dan ketepatan pesanan di Burger King Kota Warisan.

Pada 16 Mei 2026 sekitar jam 7:30 malam, saya telah membuat pembelian di cawangan tersebut. Semasa membuat pesanan, saya telah memaklumkan dengan jelas bahawa saya hanya menginginkan bahagian ayam paha (thigh). Namun, pesanan yang diterima adalah bahagian lain yang tidak menepati permintaan saya. Mereka minta menunggu 10minit dan terpaksa cancel.

Selain itu, saya mendapati rasa ayam tersebut seperti tidak segar dan kualiti makanan yang disediakan tidak setanding dengan standard yang saya harapkan daripada Burger King.

Keadaan ini menyebabkan saya berasa kecewa dan bimbang terhadap tahap kawalan kualiti makanan serta ketelitian pihak pengurusan dalam memenuhi permintaan pelanggan.

Saya berharap pihak Burger King dapat menyiasat perkara ini dan mengambil tindakan sewajarnya bagi memastikan kualiti makanan serta perkhidmatan sentiasa berada pada tahap terbaik.

Kerjasama dan maklum balas daripada pihak tuan/puan amat saya hargai.

Terima kasih..
